# Safe Claims Matrix

| Evidence available | Safe claim | Unsafe claim |
|---|---|---|
| Formal model only | This mechanism can alter allocation under stated assumptions | This specific campaign worked |
| Randomized experiment in adjacent domain | Humans/platforms are susceptible to this mechanism | The named case definitely used this mechanism |
| Public coordination pattern | Pattern is statistically consistent with coordination | The actors were paid/bots/fraudsters |
| Platform policy violation confirmed | Platform found prohibited behaviour | Broader criminality beyond the finding |
| Regulator/court action | Documented legal enforcement or allegations | Facts beyond the regulator/court record |
| Reporting plus denial | Reported allegations with denial | Settled misconduct |
| Reddit/operator chatter | Anecdotal ecosystem signal | Primary proof |
